creator: mia@trecom.tomsk.ru
text:
Motheboard GA-8I915ME-GL (GIGABYTE 915/910 series)
Sound chip: RTL8100C
Onboard Audio:
      Realtek ALC655 CODEC
      Supports Line In; Line Out; MIC In
      Supports 2/4/6 channel audio
      SPDIF In/Out connection
      CD In / AUX In connection
      Supports Jack-Sensing function
Bios on screen send mulimedia on IRQ 7 

In kernel:

device          sound
device          snd_ich

Load with ext. og
dmesg
..
found-> vendor=0x8086, dev=0x266e, revid=0x05
        bus=0, slot=30, func=2
        class=04-01-00, hdrtype=0x00, mfdev=0
        cmdreg=0x0007, statreg=0x0290, cachelnsz=0 (dwords)
        lattimer=0x00 (0 ns), mingnt=0x00 (0 ns), maxlat=0x00 (0 ns)
        intpin=a, irq=7
        powerspec 2  supports D0 D3  current D0
        map[10]: type 4, range 32, base 0000d400, size  8, enabled
        map[14]: type 4, range 32, base 0000d800, size  6, enabled
        map[18]: type 1, range 32, base f01c1000, size  9, enabled
        map[1c]: type 1, range 32, base f01c2000, size  8, enabled

pcm0: Reserved 0x100 bytes for rid 0x1c type 3 at 0xf01c2000

pcm0: sndbuf_setmap 1eca8000, 4000; 0xd51eb000 -> 1eca8000
